name: palantir
tagline: Encode taste in tooling; humans review only logic.
philosophy: Expensive review attention goes to program logic, never to style, syntax, or formatting — those are settled by tools. Maximal analyzer strictness with pragmatic ratchets for legacy.

gates.description: Every new lint/type suppression needs an inline justification comment, and the checker inventories all new suppressions in its report. Unjustified suppression blocks GREEN.
If the project has a formatter, it runs before checks; style comments from reviewers are forbidden — style disagreement means the formatter config is wrong.
Strictness ratchets: changed files meet full strictness; legacy violations elsewhere are counted and must never grow.
No unused imports or undeclared dependencies introduced by the diff.
One logical change per cycle with a real explanation of why, recorded in the ledger.
